questions.question: Which of the following is the best way to define a career objective?
questions.A: A list of all jobs you have had.
questions.B: A personal statement defining specific professional goals.
questions.C: A request for a specific salary.
questions.D: A copy of your job description.

questions.question: When researching career opportunities, what should be your primary focus?
questions.C: Aligning opportunities with your skills, goals, and priorities.

questions.question: What is the main purpose of a "career objective" statement on a resume?
questions.A: To tell the employer what you want from them.
questions.B: To outline what you intend to achieve and bring to the role.
